name: vaultspec-dashboard
description: DTCG resolver manifest for the dashboard color framework. The 'base' set (primitives + the light/default semantic + public surface) is always active; the theme axis selects exactly one of light/dark/high-contrast, which override the semantic tier and the diverging public tokens. This preserves the [data-theme] remap model in frontend/src/styles.css while the token values are authored to match the binding Figma foundation: light is the :root default (also emitted as an explicit [data-theme="light"] peer), dark and high-contrast are peer remaps. Style Dictionary consumes (sets, modifier) pairs to emit the :root + [data-theme] CSS; Tokens Studio consumes the same to write Figma collections (Primitives = one mode; Semantic = light/dark/high-contrast modes).
